title: May 12 public and supervised community issue package
automation: Public web, official pages, direct venue/business pages, supervised Facebook/Nextdoor capture, and source-desk review
verificationRule: Keep public links attached and route Facebook/Nextdoor chatter through selected posts, screenshots, or internal capture notes before publication.
suggestedAngle: Lead the issue with what the public scrape proved today and how private-platform signals enter through supervised capture.

title: Starbucks state incentive watch
cadence: Follow after State Funding Board vote
verificationRule: Credit Axios for the grant amount and re-check after the May 20 vote before treating the incentive as approved.
suggestedAngle: Translate the incentive ask into Nashville jobs, commute, and public-money math.

title: Vision Zero meeting plus hubNashville irritation check
verificationRule: Use hubNashville requests as resident-reported intake, not proof that Metro verified every claim.
suggestedAngle: Turn road-safety frustration into a receipt-backed irritation index.

title: Tourism and Major Event Fund meetings
verificationRule: Pull agendas and minutes when posted for follow-up details.
suggestedAngle: Show how event-money rooms become traffic, barricades, and riverfront pressure.

title: East Bank Boulevard feedback watch
verificationRule: Treat this as a watch item until boulevard feedback materials or EBDA agenda items post.
suggestedAngle: Keep East Nashville focused on the north-south street that will shape the riverfront.

title: The Basement East May 12 show listing
verificationRule: Confirm ticket status and age details with the venue page before sending readers out the door.
suggestedAngle: Make same-day event logistics feel like local neighborhood intelligence.

title: East Branch Library late-hours note
verificationRule: Use the branch page for hours and the library calendar for specific event listings.
suggestedAngle: Treat library hours as practical neighborhood infrastructure.

title: 5 Points Diner stale-opening source check
automation: Local outlet search plus direct business page check
verificationRule: Use old opening stories only as history; current hours and programming should come from the business directly.
suggestedAngle: Show why restaurant scrapes need direct-source checks before calling something new.

title: Private Facebook group temperature check
automation: Kenny-selected browser capture, screenshots, links, and internal source notes
verificationRule: Publish as chatter unless confirmed by a public record, direct source, or multiple credible posts. Use screenshots when they add authenticity; hard-redact kids, medical/financial details, private addresses, phones, plates, and unverified private-person accusations. Do not use unattended private-group scraping.
suggestedAngle: Extract recurring complaints, opening rumors, lost-and-found patterns, and weirdly specific neighborhood debates without treating chatter as fact.

title: Development tracker watchlist for Gallatin corridor changes
verificationRule: Confirm parcel, case number, application type, and current status before publishing.
suggestedAngle: Turn permit and planning activity into a plain-English Gallatin watchlist with jokes only after the facts are nailed down.

title: Restaurant and venue account watchlist
automation: Public social monitoring once handles are seeded
verificationRule: Use direct business posts for facts; label reposts and comments as chatter.
suggestedAngle: Track openings, closings, menus, staff hiring, soft launches, and suspiciously confident patio announcements.

title: Tomato Art Fest planning and sponsor/event calendar
verificationRule: Confirm dates, vendor lists, road closures, and official event updates.
suggestedAngle: Build a festival prep hub: dates, oddities, vendor watch, parking sanity, family options, and the tomato-adjacent fashion forecast.

title: Street, sidewalk, and lane closure permit scan
verificationRule: Confirm closure location, permit type, date window, and whether it affects sidewalks, lanes, or events.
suggestedAngle: Make a weekly Cone Watch that explains exactly where movement will become emotionally expensive.

title: Building permit and sign permit scan for restaurant/bar corridors
automation: Permit search by corridor, address, and business name
verificationRule: Match permits to address/business carefully; do not infer opening dates from permits alone.
suggestedAngle: Turn boring permit activity into an early warning system for openings, patios, signs, closures, and neighborhood fights.

title: 311 irritation index for potholes, trash, sidewalks, and lights
verificationRule: Treat resident requests as reported problems, not proof that Metro found a violation.
suggestedAngle: Rank the service requests that reveal what East Nashville is actually mad about before the comments discover adjectives.

title: Neighborhood association updates and civic agenda items
verificationRule: Cross-check civic claims with Metro records when they mention legislation, zoning, or enforcement.
suggestedAngle: Translate neighborhood association updates into what residents actually need to know and what will become a comment-section sport.

title: East Precinct public safety trend check
source: MNPD data dashboards and crime maps
cadence: Daily light scan, weekly trend scan
verificationRule: Prefer trends and official updates. Avoid names/mug shots unless public interest is strong and sourcing is clean.
suggestedAngle: Cover safety without becoming a fear machine: patterns, official context, and what residents can actually use.

title: Weekend agenda from venues, parks, libraries, and event calendars
source: Do615, venue calendars, Metro Parks, Nashville Public Library
verificationRule: Link every event to an official event page or venue post, and confirm age/family details before calling it kid-friendly.
suggestedAngle: Give people a weekend plan that is useful, not just a pile of fliers wearing a trench coat.

title: East Nashville mentions across local outlets and newsletters
source: Axios Nashville, Nashville Scene, WSMV, Eater, Tennessean, City Cast
verificationRule: Credit the outlet, link the source, and add a distinct East Nashville angle instead of rewriting their reporting.
suggestedAngle: Catch the East Nashville items inside citywide coverage and explain why our little corner should care.

title: Reader tips and neighborhood receipts
verificationRule: Anonymous tips can start drafts, but accusations need records, named sources, or multiple credible confirmations.
suggestedAngle: Turn tips into leads, polls, correction prompts, and source-backed stories without making the inbox a lawsuit blender.

title: X search for officials, reporters, Metro departments, and East Nashville terms
verificationRule: Direct/official posts can confirm their own statements; everything else needs backup.
suggestedAngle: Use public chatter to find the smoke, then make sure there is actual fire before we act like we brought marshmallows.

title: Nextdoor pattern capture for services, family pain, lost pets, and safety chatter
status: Supervised daily capture lane; manual panel live
automation: Source Desk paste-and-review capture for Kenny-selected notes; developer access only if approved
cadence: Daily supervised pattern review when selected posts are available
verificationRule: Use selected notes, screenshots, or post links as source texture. Hard-redact kids, medical/financial details, private addresses, phones, plates, and unverified private-person accusations; do not publish accusations from Nextdoor without independent confirmation.
suggestedAngle: Use it for patterns, not pile-ons: family logistics, service requests, lost-and-found, and neighborhood mysteries.
